subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him whom God hath loved and ordained for him, in His presence, an exalted station, that he may render thanks unto his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی احبه الله و قدر له فی جواره مقام رفیع لیشکر ربه و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
